deferred_to_upstream.summary: Encrypted-storage decryption belongs in the Printing Press generator's standard template for Electron-app CLIs
deferred_to_upstream.reason: Granola, Slack, VS Code, Signal, Notion, and many other Electron apps use the same OSCrypt envelope on macOS. A shared safestorage-style helper in the generator templates would let future printed CLIs handle encrypted local stores out of the box. Filing as a follow-up rather than blocking this PR on a generator-side change.

deferred_to_upstream.summary: Linux libsecret and Windows DPAPI implementations of safestorage.Key
deferred_to_upstream.reason: Current safestorage_other.go returns ErrUnsupportedPlatform. Linux libsecret + Windows DPAPI keychain access patterns are well-documented; deferred so the macOS-blocking issue ships now.

supabase.json.enc covers the primary token surface today. stored-accounts.json.enc is rarely populated on modern installs; the existing plaintext stored-accounts fallback stays in place for legacy users.
